reason: Successfully tested agent interaction: navigated to localhost, opened target agent, verified idle status, sent math question, received correct response "4" within seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent app and sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260502-183816-o4yq" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing idle status and agent home interface
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator displayed "idle" with appropriate icon
Clicked message input field — Input field focused and ready for text
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message entered in the compose field
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, chat view appeared, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response — Agent responded in 1 second with the answer "4"
Verified response contains "4" — Response displays "4" prominently in the chat, satisfying requirement
Took screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message and agent response "4"
